intentSynonyms: upload a file to a channel in discord
description: Upload a file to a Discord channel. Supports text files and base64-encoded binary files.

channel.description: Channel ID to share the file to

content.description: File content as a UTF-8 string (text files) or base64-encoded string (binary files)

filename.description: Name of the file including extension (e.g., report.txt, image.png)

is_base64.description: Set to true when content is base64-encoded (e.g., binary files like images or PDFs). Defaults to false (UTF-8 text).

initial_comment.description: Message text to include with the file upload
